title: Software Update - "1" or "2" tag on the tab if any component is outdated
scenario: Verify that a numeric badge appears on the Software Update tab indicating the count of outdated components with available updates.
steps: Open the application and navigate to the Software Update tab.
Ensure that one or more components are outdated (e.g., by having available updates).
Observe the Software Update tab for any numeric tag (e.g., '1' or '2').
Verify that the numeric tag matches the number of outdated components with available updates.
expected: A numeric tag (e.g., "1" or "2") appears on the Software Update tab, indicating the number of components with available updates.
